# Screens To Review

Review these states in the Windows phone frame before any GitHub upload:

1. Idle or ready surface.
2. Listening state.
3. Speaking state.
4. Keyboard compact mode.
5. Help sheet.
6. Inspection state.
7. Control Mesh handoff.
8. Permission denied state.
9. No speech state.
10. Object model missing state.

The phone frame should feel like JARVIS. The right-side controls are only the external preview harness.
